note: Curses are hidden until the weapon is equipped. Global roll chance is 1% for any non-starter weapon. See weapon_quality_system.json for probability rules. Cursed quality weapons have 100% curse chance.
reveal_mechanic: Curse is unknown until item is equipped. Tooltip shows '???' until equipped. On equip, curse is revealed and added to item tooltip permanently.
removal: Most curses can only be removed by an Enchanter NPC. The Bound curse must be removed first if present alongside other curses.

curses.name: Bound
curses.mechanical_effect: The weapon cannot be unequipped or replaced without visiting an Enchanter. All other equipped curses on this weapon remain active until an Enchanter removes the Bound curse first.
curses.tooltip_text: Bound — Cannot unequip without an Enchanter.
curses.flavor: Something has anchored it to your grip. You cannot let go.

curses.name: Heavy Grip
curses.mechanical_effect: Reduces attack speed. Weapon initiative order is reduced by 1 position each combat turn.
curses.tooltip_text: Heavy Grip — Reduced attack speed.
curses.flavor: It feels heavier than it looks. Each swing costs more than it should.

curses.name: Dull Edge
curses.mechanical_effect: Weapon damage decreases by 5% per combat turn (cumulative, to a minimum of 50% base damage). Can be resharpened after battle at a smithing bench; resets to full for next battle.
curses.tooltip_text: Dull Edge — Loses sharpness in combat. Resharpenable after battle.
curses.flavor: The edge dulls faster than any metal should. Something is working against you.

curses.name: Slippery Haft
curses.mechanical_effect: Each attack has a 15% chance to fumble (drop the weapon for 1 turn; costs an action to retrieve). Accuracy also reduced by 10%.
curses.tooltip_text: Slippery Haft — 15% fumble chance per attack.
curses.flavor: The grip seems slick regardless of what you do. One day it will slip at the worst moment.

curses.name: Hunger
curses.mechanical_effect: Each strike drains 3% of the wielder's current Battle Stamina pool.
curses.tooltip_text: Hunger — Drains 3% Battle Stamina per strike.
curses.flavor: It feeds on your effort. The more you use it, the heavier it gets.

curses.name: Bloodthirst
curses.mechanical_effect: Each attack drains 2% of the wielder's current HP as the weapon draws life energy.
curses.tooltip_text: Bloodthirst — Drains 2% wielder HP per attack.
curses.flavor: It needs blood — yours, if you do not provide it another's quickly enough.

curses.name: Misaligned
curses.mechanical_effect: Weapon's attack rolls are heavily weighted toward the minimum damage range. Effective damage output is approximately 70% of the rolled range's midpoint.
curses.tooltip_text: Misaligned — Consistently rolls low damage.
curses.flavor: The balance is just slightly off. No matter how well you aim, something is wrong.

curses.name: Jagged Grip
curses.mechanical_effect: 10% of all damage dealt is reflected back to the wielder as Slashing (Thorns) damage.
curses.tooltip_text: Jagged Grip — Reflects 10% of dealt damage to wielder.
curses.flavor: The hilt cuts into your palm. You feel every hit.

curses.name: Fragile Spirit
curses.mechanical_effect: Item durability degrades at 3× the normal rate. Each battle, the weapon has a 20% chance to lose one durability tier.
curses.tooltip_text: Fragile Spirit — Degrades rapidly. Requires frequent repair.
curses.flavor: It resists being maintained. As if it wants to fall apart.

curses.name: Whispering
curses.mechanical_effect: Constantly emits faint whispers only the wielder can hear. Reduces Cognition-based rolls by 10% during combat. Worsens with time in combat.
curses.tooltip_text: Whispering — Reduces Cognition rolls by 10% in combat.
curses.flavor: It never stops. The words are almost understandable, which is the worst part.

curses.name: Cold Touch
curses.mechanical_effect: The wielder takes 1 point of Chill damage per attack made, regardless of hit or miss.
curses.tooltip_text: Cold Touch — Deals 1 Chill damage to wielder per attack.
curses.flavor: It is always cold. Not cool — cold. The kind that reaches into bone.

curses.name: Heat Bleed
curses.mechanical_effect: Builds heat in the wielder over combat. Every 3 turns of attacking, the wielder suffers a stack of Heat status (each stack deals 2 Fire damage at end of turn). Maximum 5 stacks.
curses.tooltip_text: Heat Bleed — Builds heat stacks on wielder each turn. 2 Fire dmg/stack at turn end.
curses.flavor: The grip grows warm. Then hot. Then it becomes a problem.

curses.name: Phased
curses.mechanical_effect: Damage variance is doubled. The weapon rolls on a much wider range — may hit very high or very low with equal probability. Unpredictable in extended fights.
curses.tooltip_text: Phased — Inconsistent. Wide damage variance on every hit.
curses.flavor: Sometimes it bites deep. Sometimes it passes through like it isn't really there.

curses.name: Marked
curses.mechanical_effect: The wielder becomes significantly easier to detect and track. Stealth reduced by 25%. Enemies with tracking abilities find the wielder automatically.
curses.tooltip_text: Marked — Stealth -25%. Enemies with tracking find wielder automatically.
curses.flavor: Carrying it feels like holding a torch in the dark. Something always knows where you are.

curses.name: Leeching Edge
curses.mechanical_effect: Natural HP regeneration is reduced by 50% while the weapon is equipped (both in and out of combat).
curses.tooltip_text: Leeching Edge — Natural HP regeneration -50% while equipped.
curses.flavor: Your wounds close slower. The weapon takes something from you, even when sheathed.

curses.name: Simpleton
curses.mechanical_effect: Weapon damage is reduced by 30% when the wielder uses any advanced martial skill (skill tier 2 or higher). Bonus from combat skills and abilities is ignored.
curses.tooltip_text: Simpleton — Penalises advanced martial skills. -30% damage on skilled strikes.
curses.flavor: The weapon resists being used well. It prefers brute force over technique.

curses.name: Clumsy Weight
curses.mechanical_effect: Attack recovery time between swings is increased. Weapon initiative penalty of -2 positions each turn. The wielder always acts last in a tie.
curses.tooltip_text: Clumsy Weight — Initiative -2 each turn. Always last in ties.
curses.flavor: Each swing leaves you off-balance. Recovering takes longer than it should.

curses.name: Chaotical
curses.mechanical_effect: 5% chance per attack that the weapon targets a random entity on the battlefield instead of the intended target — friend or foe. This cannot be controlled.
curses.tooltip_text: Chaotical — 5% chance to strike a random target instead of intended.
curses.flavor: The weapon has opinions. They do not always align with yours.

curses.name: Rotting Aura
curses.mechanical_effect: The wielder takes 2 points of Blight damage at the end of each combat turn while the weapon is equipped.
curses.tooltip_text: Rotting Aura — Wielder takes 2 Blight damage per combat turn.
curses.flavor: The air around the blade smells of decay. It is working on you as much as anything you face.

curses.name: Soul Tax
curses.mechanical_effect: Each successful strike temporarily drains 3 Conviction from the wielder for the remainder of the current battle. Resets after battle ends.
curses.tooltip_text: Soul Tax — Each successful hit drains 3 Conviction (battle only). Resets after battle.
curses.flavor: You win, but it costs something that isn't stamina. After every fight, it is harder to remember why.
